gui.comment_under_title:
Paste the message generated by the #1 button bellow in $CONFIG.text.support_place$.

If you can, please share more about how the crash happened.
gui.request_help_button: #2: THEN CLICK HERE to go to $CONFIG.text.support_name$
gui.comment_under_title_pls_report: To report the problem or get help, please join $CONFIG.text.support_name$.
gui.upload_all_button: #1: CLICK HERE to prepare info to help us
gui.too_many_changes_warning_notice:
You've made changes to the modpack ($MODIFICATIONS_COUNT$).
Such changes to a curated pack may cause issues and crashes.
This also applies to using the "Update All" button in the launcher.
Please add new mods in small batches and make sure to test everything carefully.
Before asking for support, first check if the problem exists with the un-modified pack.
